summary: DHH announces the launch of a new Ruby on Rails podcast hosted by Scott Barron, with DHH as the first guest. He acknowledges the audio quality is rough since it was recorded on an iBook's built-in mic, but promises improvements. The show aims to be a weekly occurrence with multiple interview subjects already lined up.
key_points: Ruby on Rails launches its own podcast with Scott Barron as host and DHH as inaugural guest
Rails is powering Odeo, one of the premier podcasting platforms at the time
The show plans to be weekly with better audio equipment coming soon
money_quotes: Considering that Ruby on Rails is powering one of the premier destinations for podcasting with Odeo, it couldn't stand long that we didn't have our own show.
key_insight: The Rails community was growing its media presence with a dedicated podcast, leveraging the framework's connection to the podcasting world through Odeo.
